top_signals.title: South Africa Gains Lift Investec Profit, Dividend to Record
top_signals.summary: Investec posted a record dividend for the fourth straight year as the South Africa- and UK-listed bank’s full-year profit climbed to a new high.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea Set to Reduce Debt Sales in June as Bonds Slump
top_signals.summary: South Korea will cut its debt issuance in June, the finance ministry said, as the government steps up its defense of the bond market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
